ab: nasuljivat sun, anema a uri su velin?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: uri veneli aken ta kupu.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: nasuljivat sun, anema a uri su velin?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: uri veneli aken tu ita ta talupun.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: uri veneli aken ta kupu, izua nu sipaveliveli?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: izua, pida a su velin?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: izua nu sipaveliveli a saviki?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: neka, inika men a paveliveli ta saviki.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: uri veneli aken ta paday.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: pida a su velin?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: Keljan pavayu aken tua telu a tuvungan.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: uri veneli aken ta vurasi.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: sinipaveli anga penuljat a vurasi.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: uri veneli aken tu drusa ta djiuq.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: amin anga a ita i tjanuamen.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: sau velian aken ta qecilu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: uri nangking a su veliing?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: uri nangking a su veliing a qecilu?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: uri veneli aken tu drusa a king.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: uri veneli aken tu drusa a djaljeng a kucay.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: izua tjelu a djaljengan a tjeza, nisun nay anga a penuljat.
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pida a kakavilian ta icu i tuvung a paday?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: nu ita i tuvung drusa iday.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: drusa a pulu’ katu ita a vatan a pepenuyatan, nu drusa a pulu’ ki pariya.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: maljimalji.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: siva a pulu’  katu lima vatan a imaza.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: pai kiveli anan aken tu kedri, padjaljuni tu taiday.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: lima a iday saka puluq a vatan a pipenuljatan.
en: A:All $510.

ab: pai paka lima a idayu aken?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: aicu pazangal aravac, makaya papemaduluin a pagalju?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: inika makaya, aicu tjaljamaduluan anga aravac.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: uri veneli aken ta icu a kua.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: aicu a kua tjelu a puluq a vatan, izuanan a zuma uri su velin?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
